text: Stack smashing archival reference names Phrack issue 49, file 14, Smashing the Stack for Fun and Profit, as the authoritative reference and preserves provenance.
Deterministic retrieval must remain explicit and inspectable. Exact phrase search should find this corpus chunk without broadening.
Proxy hydration succeeds when the pointer targets this corpus document and the summary remains compact and inspectable.
A negative control document mentions gardens, recipes, weather, and travel plans but not the checkpoint token or stack smashing provenance.
Proxy failure and no-result behavior must stay honest. The system should report missing evidence plainly and never invent memory.
